name: Lemony Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Finely Grated Fresh Lemon Zest
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the beans and place them in a large saucepan of boiling salted water. Cook until crisp-tender, about 3-5 minutes.
2. Drain the beans well in a colander.
3. In a bowl, toss the beans with zest, oil, and salt and pepper to taste.
Serves 2
